title: Parvati Chalisa
intro: Shri Parvati Chalisa - Hymn to Goddess Parvati
description:
॥ Shri Parvati Chalisa (English Transliteration) ॥

।।Doha।।
Jai giri tanaye dakshaje shambhu priye gunakhani .
Ganpati janani Parvati ambe ! Shakti ! Bhavani ।।

।।Chaupai।।
Brahma bhed na tumharo paave .
Panch badan nit tumko dhyave ।।
Shad-mukh kahi na sakat yash tero .
Sahasbadan shram karat ghanero ।।
Teu paar na paavat mata .
Sthit raksha lay hit sajata ।।
Adhar praval sadrish arunare .
Ati kamniya nayan kajrare ।।
Lalit lalaat vilepit keshar .
Kumkum akshat shobha manhar ।।
Kanak basan kanchuki sajae .
Kati mekhala divya laharae ।।
Kanth madar haar ki shobha .
Jaahi dekhi sahajahi man lobha ।।
Baalarun anant chhabi dhari .
Aabhushan ki shobha pyari ।।
Nana jadit sinhasan .
Taapar rajati Hari chaturanan ।।
Indradik parivar pujit .
Jag mrig naag raksh rav kujit ।।
Gir Kailash nivashini jay jay .
Kotik prabha vikasini jay jay ।।
Tribhuvan sakal kutumb tihari .
Anu anu mahan tumhari ujiyari ।।
Hain Mahesh pranesh ! Tumhare .
Tribhuvan ke jo nit rakhware ।।
Unso pati tum prapt kinha jab .
Sukrit puratan udit bhae tab ।।
Budha bail savari jinki .
Mahima ka gavai kou tinki ।।
Sada shamshan bihari Shankar .
Aabhushan hai bhujang bhayankar ।।
Kanth halahal ko chhabi chhai .
Neelkanth ki padvi pai ।।
Dev magan ke hit as kinhon .
Vish lai aarpu tinahi ami dinhon ।।
Taaki tum patni chhabi dharini .
Durit vidarini mangal karini ।।
Dekhi param saundarya tiharo .
Tribhuvan chakit banavan haro ।।
Bhay bhita so mata Ganga .
Lajja may hai salil taranga ।।
Saut saman Shambhu pah aayi .
Vishnu padabj chhodhi so dhayi ।।
Tehikon kamal badan murjhayo .
Lakhi satvar Shiv sheesh chadhayo ।।
Nityanand kari bardayini .
Abhay bhakt kar nit anpayini ।।
Akhil paap traytaap nikandini .
Maheshwari Himalaya nandini ।।
Kashi puri sada man bhayi .
Siddh peeth tehi aapu banayi ।।
Bhagwati pratidin bhiksha datri .
Kripa pramod sneh vidhatri ।।
Ripukshay karini jay jay Ambe .
Vacha siddh kari avlambe ।।
Gauri Uma Shankari Kali .
Annapurna jag pratipali ।।
Sab jan ki ishwari Bhagwati .
Pratiprana Parameshwari Sati ।।
Tumne kathin tapasya kini .
Narad so jab shiksha lini ।।
Anna na neer na vayu ahara .
Asthi matratan bhayau tumhara ।।
Patra gahas ko khadya na bhayau .
Uma naam tab tumne payau ।।
Tap biloki rishi saat padhare .
Lage digavan digi na haare ।।
Tab tav jay jay jay uchhareu .
Saptarishi nij geh sidhareu ।।
Sur vidhi Vishnu paas tab aae .
Var dene ke vachan sunaae ।।
Maange Uma var pati tum tinsom .
Chahat jag tribhuvan nidhi jinsom ।।
Evamastu kahi te doau gae .
Suphal manorath tumne lae ।।
Kari vivah Shiv som he Bhama .
Punah kahai Har ki bama ।।
Jo padhihai jan yah chalisa .
Dhan jan sukh deihai tehi Isa ।।

।।Doha।।
Koot chandrika subhag shir jayati jayati sukh khani .
Parvati nij bhakt hit rahahu sada vardani ।।
meaning:
॥ Shri Parvati Chalisa (English Transliteration & Meaning) ॥

।।Doha।।
Jai giri tanaye dakshaje shambhu priye gunakhani .
(Victory to the daughter of the mountain, daughter of Daksha, beloved of Shambhu, and mine of virtues.)
Ganpati janani Parvati ambe ! Shakti ! Bhavani !!
(Mother of Ganpati, Parvati, Ambe, Shakti, Bhavani.)

।।Chaupai।।
Brahma bhed na tumharo paave .
(Even Brahma cannot grasp your secret.)
Panch badan nit tumko dhyave !!
(Five-faced Shiva meditates on you daily.)
Shad-mukh kahi na sakat yash tero .
(Six-faced Kartikeya cannot describe your glory.)
Sahasbadan shram karat ghanero !!
(Thousand-headed Sheshnag toils much [to praise you].)
Teu paar na paavat mata .
(Even they cannot reach your limit, O Mother.)
Sthit raksha lay hit sajata !!
(You appear for the sake of creation, protection, and dissolution.)
Adhar praval sadrish arunare .
(Your lips are red like coral.)
Ati kamniya nayan kajrare !!
(Your kajal-lined eyes are very beautiful.)
Lalit lalaat vilepit keshar .
(Your beautiful forehead is anointed with saffron.)
Kumkum akshat shobha manhar !!
(Vermilion and unbroken rice grains make your beauty captivating.)
Kanak basan kanchuki sajae .
(Decorated in golden clothes and bodice.)
Kati mekhala divya laharae !!
(Your divine waist-girdle sways.)
Kanth madar haar ki shobha .
(The beauty of the necklace of Madar flowers around your neck.)
Jaahi dekhi sahajahi man lobha !!
(Seeing which the mind is naturally attracted.)
Baalarun anant chhabi dhari .
(Bearing the infinite beauty of the rising sun.)
Aabhushan ki shobha pyari !!
(The beauty of your ornaments is lovely.)
Nana jadit sinhasan .
(Sitting on a throne inlaid with various jewels.)
Taapar rajati Hari chaturanan !!
(On which sits the four-faced Brahma.)
Indradik parivar pujit .
(Worshipped by the family of Indra and others.)
Jag mrig naag raksh rav kujit !!
(Resounding with the praises of world animals, nagas, and demons.)
Gir Kailash nivashini jay jay .
(Victory to the dweller of Mount Kailash.)
Kotik prabha vikasini jay jay !!
(Victory to the one who radiates light of crores of suns.)
Tribhuvan sakal kutumb tihari .
(The three worlds are your entire family.)
Anu anu mahan tumhari ujiyari !!
(Your light is in every atom.)
Hain Mahesh pranesh ! Tumhare .
(Mahesh is the Lord of your life.)
Tribhuvan ke jo nit rakhware !!
(Who is the eternal protector of the three worlds.)
Unso pati tum prapt kinha jab .
(When you attained him as a husband.)
Sukrit puratan udit bhae tab !!
(Then your ancient merits manifested.)
Budha bail savari jinki .
(Whose vehicle is an old bull.)
Mahima ka gavai kou tinki !!
(Who can sing his glory?)
Sada shamshan bihari Shankar .
(Shankar, who always wanders in the cremation ground.)
Aabhushan hai bhujang bhayankar !!
(Whose ornaments are terrifying snakes.)
Kanth halahal ko chhabi chhai .
(The beauty of the poison Halahal on his throat.)
Neelkanth ki padvi pai !!
(He attained the title of Neelkanth.)
Dev magan ke hit as kinhon .
(He did this for the sake of the Gods.)
Vish lai aarpu tinahi ami dinhon !!
(Taking the poison, he gave them nectar.)
Taaki tum patni chhabi dharini .
(You are the image-bearing wife of such a Lord.)
Durit vidarini mangal karini !!
(Destroyer of sins and the doer of auspiciousness.)
Dekhi param saundarya tiharo .
(Seeing your supreme beauty.)
Tribhuvan chakit banavan haro !!
(The creator of the three worlds is amazed.)
Bhay bhita so mata Ganga .
(Mother Ganga became terrified.)
Lajja may hai salil taranga !!
(Her waves became filled with shyness.)
Saut saman Shambhu pah aayi .
(She came to Shambhu like a co-wife.)
Vishnu padabj chhodhi so dhayi !!
(Leaving the lotus feet of Vishnu, she ran.)
Tehikon kamal badan murjhayo .
(Her lotus-face withered.)
Lakhi satvar Shiv sheesh chadhayo !!
(Seeing this, Shiva immediately placed her on his head.)
Nityanand kari bardayini .
(Giver of eternal joy and boons.)
Abhay bhakt kar nit anpayini !!
(You give fearlessness to devotees and are never separated.)
Akhil paap traytaap nikandini .
(Destroyer of all sins and the three types of sufferings.)
Maheshwari Himalaya nandini !!
(Great Goddess, Daughter of the Himalayas.)
Kashi puri sada man bhayi .
(Kashi city always pleased your mind.)
Siddh peeth tehi aapu banayi !!
(You yourself made it a Siddh Peeth.)
Bhagwati pratidin bhiksha datri .
(Goddess, daily giver of alms.)
Kripa pramod sneh vidhatri !!
(Giver of grace, joy, and affection.)
Ripukshay karini jay jay Ambe .
(Victory to you, Ambe, destroyer of enemies.)
Vacha siddh kari avlambe !!
(You are the support who grants success in speech.)
Gauri Uma Shankari Kali .
(Gauri, Uma, Shankari, Kali.)
Annapurna jag pratipali !!
(Annapurna, who nourishes the world.)
Sab jan ki ishwari Bhagwati .
(Goddess of all people.)
Pratiprana Parameshwari Sati !!
(Supreme Goddess Sati, the soul of all.)
Tumne kathin tapasya kini .
(You performed difficult penance.)
Narad so jab shiksha lini !!
(When you took guidance from Narada.)
Anna na neer na vayu ahara .
(No food, no water, no air as sustenance.)
Asthi matratan bhayau tumhara !!
(Your body became just bones.)
Patra gahas ko khadya na bhayau .
(Even eating dry leaves did not please you.)
Uma naam tab tumne payau !!
(Then you attained the name 'Uma'.)
Tap biloki rishi saat padhare .
(Seeing the penance, seven sages arrived.)
Lage digavan digi na haare !!
(Tried to distract you, but you did not falter.)
Tab tav jay jay jay uchhareu .
(Then they chanted your victory.)
Saptarishi nij geh sidhareu !!
(The seven sages went to their homes.)
Sur vidhi Vishnu paas tab aae .
(Gods came to Brahma and Vishnu then.)
Var dene ke vachan sunaae !!
(And announced the promise to give boons.)
Maange Uma var pati tum tinsom .
(O Uma, you asked for a husband from them.)
Chahat jag tribhuvan nidhi jinsom !!
(From whom the world and three worlds seek treasures.)
Evamastu kahi te doau gae .
(Saying "So be it", both went away.)
Suphal manorath tumne lae !!
(You attained the fulfillment of your desires.)
Kari vivah Shiv som he Bhama .
(After marrying Shiva, O Bhama.)
Punah kahai Har ki bama !!
(You were again called 'Har ki Bama' [wife of Har/Shiva].)
Jo padhihai jan yah chalisa .
(The person who reads this Chalisa.)
Dhan jan sukh deihai tehi Isa !!
(The Lord will grant them wealth, progeny, and happiness.)

।।Doha।।
Koot chandrika subhag shir jayati jayati sukh khani .
(Victory to the one with the beautiful crescent moon on her head, mine of happiness.)
Parvati nij bhakt hit rahahu sada vardani !!
(O Parvati, always remain a bestower of boons for the benefit of your devotees.)

faq.q1: What is the main benefit of reading the Parvati Chalisa?
faq.a1: Maa Parvati is the goddess of fortune and power. Reciting her Chalisa brings happiness, peace, and good fortune to married life.
faq.q2: Can unmarried girls also read it?
faq.a2: Yes, it is considered very effective for unmarried girls to recite the Parvati Chalisa to seek a good and suitable life partner.
faq.q3: Is there a special day to read it?
faq.a3: You can read it at any time, but Tuesday and Friday are considered especially auspicious for the worship of Maa Parvati.
faq.q4: Can men also recite the Parvati Chalisa?
faq.a4: Absolutely, men can also recite it for a happy family life, peace at home, and the well-being of their spouse.
faq.q5: Does one need to follow complex rituals to read it?
faq.a5: No, Maa Parvati is very kind. She only seeks your love and devotion. You can sit in a clean place and recite it with a calm mind.
